data_reviewer.decision_note: Object metadata and normalized classifications accepted for internal reviewed use only.

checklist.note: Every official source title is retained byte-for-byte in the reviewed basis.
Every Chinese display translation records project authorship, source-title hash, reviewer, date and reviewed decision.
